title: American-Style Chicken Skillet
description: A classic American dish made with chicken, onions, and bell peppers. Cooked in a skillet, this recipe is quick and easy to make.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through.
